meta.title: EV of a Call
meta.description: Calculate whether a call is profitable.

blocks.content:
## EV of a Call

For each problem, calculate the expected value of calling. Remember: **EV = (win% x pot) - (lose% x call amount)**. Positive means profitable, negative means you're losing money long-term. Let's sharpen that EV intuition!

blocks.title: EV of a Call
blocks.instructions: Calculate the EV of calling. EV = (win% x pot) - (lose% x call). The pot shown is what's already in the pot before your call.
